title: Ender Ore
description: Ender ore spawns in the world, giving an alternative means of gathering ender pearls
body:
The ore drops dust that can be turned into ender pearls, to provide an alternate method for gathering ender ore. Every aspect is fully configurable.

Full credit goes to Shukaro, who created the original mod and assets and let me port it forward.

Fabirc only, no Forge port is planned.

![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HtSl1iEY/images/2763d309ed27d1e32c2ae89646bc054a5177131d.png)
